chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Now next we are going to talk about how to structure our components.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: So for this, what we can do is, we can go to the Atlassian website.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And here basically, when we look at these small components,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: we can look at these components.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: So in these components, whenever we look at any big website,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: what we have to do is, by looking at any big page,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: we have to break down that page into small components.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: We have to think about which thing can be a component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: For example, this big piece, this big window can be our app component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: In it, we have a heading component,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: we have a link component,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: we have a card component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And these individual card components, in some way.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: In these card components, we have an icon component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: This is our title and description,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: we can call it as the title component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Or we can call it as the title, or our description component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Similarly, this is our title and description component again.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: So by thinking about breaking down any big website,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: we have to think about which UI element can be a component for us.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And then we have to start building those components in a smaller size.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: For example, we want to build some components in this way.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: So first of all, we will build our title component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: After that, we can build our description component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Then by combining both, we have a card component for ourselves,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: which we can build.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Or in fact, we can give them a different name.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: This single can be our product component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: We can have a title or description in the product.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Similarly, this second can be our product component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: This third can be our product component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Now when we will make our product components,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: let's make one of these.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Let's create a new component for ourselves.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: We will call it product.jsx.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Now in product.jsx, we will make a function.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: With the name of product.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And this function will return for us.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: We will return a div, in which we have H3.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: This will be H3 heading.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: This is my product title.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And we can keep one H5 heading.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: This is going to be the product description.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And we can do this.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Now we will go from here and default export.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: We will require our product.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And here we will require it.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: We can import our product.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: We can import our product from .slash.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Product.jsx.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Let's do this.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Now when we will print in the app,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: we want to display three products.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: This is our first product.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: This is our second product.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And this is our third product.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: So we are displaying three different products.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: We will save it and go here.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: So this is our first product.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: This is our second product.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: This is our third product.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: These three products are displayed for us.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: But generally when we structure our React app,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: although there is no problem in writing this code like this.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: But generally, if we combine things,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: then when we combine multiple things,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: then we make a new component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: We create a new component from that.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And this is how conventionally we write React.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Although there is no problem in writing three products in a simple app component like this.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: But generally when we write a code in React,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: then we will combine these products in a large component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: We can call this large component as product tab,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: product group,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: any product list.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: So we will create a new component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Which is going to be product tab.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: We call it product tab.jsx.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And in product tab.jsx,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: we will write function

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: product tab.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And what will it return?

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: It will basically return this value.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: This value is returning from app.jsx.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Now my product tab will return the same value.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Let's save it.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: So what will the product tab do?

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: The product tab will first combine these products.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And from here,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: we will import our product.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: From dot slash

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: product.jsx.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And by combining,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: we will export these products.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: So from here,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: export default will be our

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: product tab.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And then we will require this product tab.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Basically, from product tab,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: we will require product tab.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And we will use our product tab.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Let's do this.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: As our code will be there,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: there will be no changes.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: You can refresh it and check it.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Our UI will look the same.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: But the format of structuring the code has changed.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: How to structure?

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: First, we have to make individual components

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: which we are exporting.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: If we have to combine individual components,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: then we have to combine them in a new component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And then we are using that new component in our app.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: So in the same way, our hierarchy builds in the React.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Basically, we have a small component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: This is our product component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: When a lot of product components are combined,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: then that product tab will go into the component.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: And when we combine all these,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: then we can use it in our app.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: So this increases the reusability.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: Meaning, if we don't have a product tab,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: we have to show three product tabs.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: So for that, we can simply replicate this thing three times.

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: So if we have to use product tabs again and again,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: then to make that thing reusable,

chunks.title: Structuring Components.mp3
chunks.text: we are setting a separate component for that.
